name: SailPoint, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview SailPoint, Inc. (together with its consolidated subsidiaries, as appropriate, SailPoint, the Company, our, or we) delivers solutions to enable adaptive identity security for the enterprise. We do this via the SailPoint Platform that unifies identity data across systems and identity types, including employee identities, non-employee identities, machine identities, and AI agents for real-time governance.
